NEXTAUTH_SECRET.description: The secret used to encrypt tokens (run: openssl rand -base64 32)

DATABASE_URL.description: PostgreSQL connection string (use Vercel Postgres or Supabase)

FINNHUB_API_KEY.description: Finnhub API key for US stock data (optional)

COINGECKO_API_KEY.description: CoinGecko API key for crypto data (optional)
